name: Creamy Beef-Noodle Combo
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushroom Stem/Pieces or 1 can (10 3/4 oz) Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until the meat is browned.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in the mushroom pieces (or add the cream of mushroom soup) and remaining ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until noodles are tender, about 25 minutes. Add water if necessary.
5. Serve hot.
